title: The Bidi (Restriction of Manufacture) (Repeal) Act, 1974
description: An Act to repeal the Bidi (Restriction of Manufacture) Ordinance, 1966. WHEREAS it is expedient to repeal the Bidi (Restriction of Manufacture) Ordinance, 1966 (E.P.

provisions.title: 1. Short title and commencement
provisions.content:
1. (1) This Act may be called the Bidi (Restriction of Manufacture) (Repeal) Act, 1974 .
(2) It shall come into force at once.

provisions.title: 2. Repeal
provisions.content: 2. The Bidi (Restriction of Manufacture) Ordinance, 1966 (E.P. Ord. IV of 1966) is hereby repealed.
